stocks.ai_explanation: Exxon Mobil Corporation (XOM) is a leading multinational corporation involved in the exploration, production, refining, marketing, distribution, and sale of petroleum products worldwide. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.

Chevron Corporation (CVX) is a large American multinational corporation engaged in the exploration, production, transportation, refining, marketing, and distribution of petroleum products. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Neste Oy (NEE) is a Finnish company specializing in renewable fuels, including biofuels and aviation kerosene. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.

Shell plc (SHEL) is a British multinational energy company focused on the exploration, production, refining, marketing, and distribution of fossil fuels. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
British Petroleum (BP) is a multinational oil and gas company headquartered in London. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.

disclaimer: Educational use only. Not financial advice.
